examples.text: مُتَّكِئِينَ فِيهَا يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَاكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ وَشَرَابٍ
examples.english: There they will recline, calling for abundant fruit and drink.

etymology.text:
From the root ش ر ب (š r b) related to drinking, sipping.

Characteristic adjective from the root ش ر ب (š r b).

A reborrowing from Ottoman Turkish چوراب (çorap), doublet of جِراب (jirāb).
